task_completion.description: Create a horizontal cross-functional flowchart with the four required swimlanes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the EdrawMax interface showing a cross-functional flowchart with four horizontal swimlanes labeled 'Help Desk (Tier 1)', 'Technical Support (Tier 2)', 'Engineering (Tier 3)', and 'Management'.

task_completion.description: Add the required process shapes to the Help Desk lane.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for shapes within the Help Desk lane containing text such as 'Incident Reported', 'Log Incident', 'Classify Severity', 'Can Resolve?', 'Resolve & Document', and 'Close Ticket'.

task_completion.description: Add the required process shapes to the Technical Support lane.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for shapes within the Technical Support lane containing text such as 'Investigate Issue', 'Can Resolve?', 'Apply Fix', and 'Verify Fix'.

task_completion.description: Add the required process shapes to the Engineering lane.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for shapes within the Engineering lane containing text such as 'Root Cause Analysis', 'Develop Fix', 'Test Fix', and 'Deploy Fix'.

task_completion.description: Add the required process shapes to the Management lane.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for shapes within the Management lane containing text such as 'Notify Stakeholders' and 'Monitor Resolution'.

task_completion.description: Connect the shapes with arrows to represent the process flow.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for connector lines or arrows linking the shapes together, both within individual swimlanes and crossing over between different swimlanes (e.g., from Help Desk to Technical Support).

task_completion.description: Save the diagram as an EDDX file and export it as a PNG file in the specified directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for save/export dialog boxes, terminal commands, or a file manager window showing 'incident_management_swimlane.eddx' and 'incident_management_swimlane.png' saved in the '/home/ga/Diagrams/' directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the Wondershare EdrawMax GUI to create the flowchart.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the agent is actively clicking, dragging shapes, and typing within the EdrawMax application window, rather than writing XML/EDDX code in a text editor.

integrity.description: The flowchart consists of genuine shapes and text, not a pasted image.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the agent drags individual shapes from the library and types text into them, rather than pasting a pre-made image of a flowchart onto the canvas.

integrity.description: The PNG file was exported using the application's export feature.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the agent using the 'File -> Export' or 'Save As' menu in EdrawMax to generate the PNG, rather than just taking a screenshot of the desktop and renaming it.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected EDDX path: /home/ga/Diagrams/incident_management_swimlane.eddx. Expected PNG path: /home/ga/Diagrams/incident_management_swimlane.png. Required lanes: Help Desk, Technical Support, Engineering, Management. Required shapes include: Incident Reported, Log Incident, Classify Severity, Investigate Issue, Root Cause Analysis, Deploy Fix, Notify Stakeholders, Close Ticket. Minimum shape count: 10. Minimum connector count: 8.
